dc:title: Touring bicycle beside a rural road with distant hills
dc:description: A paved two-lane road extends from the foreground toward the center distance through a dry rural landscape. A loaded touring bicycle leans against a metal guardrail at the left edge of the road, adjacent to a concrete retaining wall and roadside vegetation. The roadway is marked with white edge and center lines; a fence line, shrubs, and open fields appear on the right. Low hills or mountains are visible on the horizon beneath a mostly clear sky. No people or vehicles are prominent in the scene.
condition_note: Colors unverified; image programmatically inverted from faded source negative.
